descriptionShort: Greg Moro interviewed at 2025 Richmond Sockeyes banner-night and Hall of Fame reunion event.
descriptionLong: Interview with Greg Moro, former Richmond Sockeyes player, recorded during the 2025 July banner-night celebration and BC Hockey Hall of Fame induction reunion. Captures reflections on the 1987 Centennial Cup championship season and the team's legacy nearly four decades later.
